questions.BIRTH_CITY: What is your city of birth?
questions.FIRST_PET: What was the name of your first pet?
questions.CHILDHOOD_BEST_FRIEND: What was the first name of your childhood best friend?
questions.PRIMARY_SCHOOL: What is the name of your primary school?
questions.FAVORITE_FOOTBALL_TEAM: What is your favorite football team?
questions.FATHER_JOB: What is (or was) your father's job?
questions.MOTHER_JOB: What is (or was) your mother's job?
questions.PATERNAL_GRANDMOTHER: What is your paternal grandmother's first name?
questions.MATERNAL_GRANDMOTHER: What is your maternal grandmother's first name?
questions.CHILDHOOD_NEIGHBORHOOD: What is the name of the neighborhood you grew up in?
questions.FIRST_TEACHER: What was your very first teacher's first name?
questions.MOTHER_MAIDEN_NAME: What is your mother's maiden name?
questions.PARENTS_MEETING_CITY: In which city did your parents meet?
questions.FAVORITE_UNCLE: What is the first name of your favorite uncle or aunt?
questions.FAVORITE_ARTIST: Who is your favorite singer or artist?
questions.FIRST_VEHICLE_BRAND: What was the brand of your first car or motorcycle?
questions.DREAM_SHOP_NAME: If you opened a shop, what name would you give it?
questions.BEST_VACATION_MEMORY: Where is the place of your best vacation memory?
questions.CHILDHOOD_CRUSH: What was the first name of your childhood crush?
questions.FAVORITE_PROVERB: What is your favorite proverb or saying?

title: Security questions
subtitle: These questions let you recover your account without access to your email.
answerHint: Your answers are never stored in plain text.
